history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A first-person style game scene shows a character in a futuristic corridor with a large glowing weapon effect and multiple on-screen UI panels.

Main Subject:
In the center, a human-like character with pale skin and a dark cap stands with one hand raised and the other lowered, facing toward the right side of the screen. The character wears a light gray upper garment with sleeves and a dark band around the forearm area, and a short skirt-like lower piece. A large red, flowing ribbon or cloak-like mass curves around the character, spreading outward and pooling near the bottom of the screen. On the right, a large blue-gray rectangular weapon or device with horizontal panel lines is aimed toward the character, with an orange glowing projectile or energy ball hovering near the center of the right side. A bright explosion effect with sparks and particles fills the mid-right background.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor sci-fi corridor or base with dark walls, metal panels, and illuminated ceiling lights. The corridor has visible floor seams and parallel lines on the ground, with orange and yellow accents. There are railings and structural beams along the sides, and a distant doorway or opening is visible in the center background.

Visual Details:
The dominant colors are red from the character’s flowing material and a red grid-like or web pattern across the lower foreground, blue from the weapon/device, and bright yellow-orange from the glowing energy effects. The camera angle is from a player viewpoint, slightly low and centered, with the weapon/device taking up the right half of the frame. Multiple glowing UI elements float around the edges, including icons at the top, a list on the right, and status panels near the bottom. The lighting is high-contrast, with sparks and particle effects emphasizing motion and impact near the center-right.

Visible Text:
5000HUMAN
TYA.CLUB
FREE FIRE MAX
MAX
TIM
Rekrut
DOWNLOAD
GOODHUMAN
BR-RANKED
Bermuda
MULAI

Practical Summary:
The image shows a futuristic game interface with a character in the center surrounded by red energy or ribbon effects. A blue-gray weapon/device on the right emits bright energy and sparks as multiple UI panels display game status and menu options.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
